title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
blurb: A comedy of manners following Elizabeth Bennet as she navigates family expectation, first impressions and the reserved Mr Darcy.

title: The Voyage of the Beagle
author: Charles Darwin
blurb: Darwin's journal of the survey expedition that shaped his thinking on geology, natural history and the origin of species.

title: A Study in Scarlet
author: Arthur Conan Doyle
blurb: The first Sherlock Holmes story, introducing the detective and Dr Watson through a baffling London murder.

title: The Wealth of Nations
author: Adam Smith
blurb: The foundational work of modern economics, on the division of labour, markets and the causes of national prosperity.

title: A Room of One's Own
author: Virginia Woolf
blurb: An extended essay on women, fiction and the material conditions that make writing possible.

title: The History of the Peloponnesian War
author: Thucydides
blurb: A contemporary account of the long conflict between Athens and Sparta, and a founding text of political history.
